params.SpellDescription: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may cast a spell from among them without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may cast a spell from among them without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever a permanent you control is put into a graveyard, you get {E} (an energy counter).
